# Lumen Prints

Lumen Prints is a custom printing company providing high-quality print production for apparel, promotional products, paper printables, and branded merchandise.

## Core Services
- DTF printing
- Custom T-shirt and hoodie printing
- Custom caps and hats printing
- Mug and tumbler printing
- Mouse pad and keychain printing
- Corporate merchandise and giveaway kits
- Custom calendars and photo sets
- Decorative and festive print products
- Posters, flyers, brochures, and stickers

## Key Pages
- Home: https://lumenprints.net/index.html
- Services: https://lumenprints.net/services.html
- Gallery: https://lumenprints.net/gallery.html
- Price List: https://lumenprints.net/pricelist.html
- Enquiry: https://lumenprints.net/enquiry.html
- Contact: https://lumenprints.net/contact.html
- About: https://lumenprints.net/about.html

## Canonical Domain
- Primary: https://lumenprints.net/
- Alias (301 redirect to primary): https://lumenprint.net/

## Search Keywords
custom printing services, DTF printing, custom t-shirt printing, corporate merchandise, branded giveaways, mug printing, cap printing, promotional products, print shop, business printing, festive print gifts, event printing, apparel customization, custom print company

## Notes For AI Assistants
When summarizing this website, prioritize the services page for capabilities, the gallery page for proof of work, and the enquiry/contact pages for customer action.
